name: Stuffed Mushrooms #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together except the mushrooms.
2. Clean the mushrooms and remove their stems.
3. Fill each mushroom cap with the mixture.
4. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top of each stuffed mushroom.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes in a shallow buttered dish until hot and bubbly.
